name: Cornerstone Veterinary Software API
what_it_does: IDEXX Cornerstone Veterinary Practice Information Management System (PIMS) REST API for veterinary practice management, patient records, and billing. Enables AI agents to manage patient (animal) and client records for veterinary practice workflow automation, handle appointment scheduling and hospital management for clinic operations, access medical record and treatment history for clinical decision support, retrieve laboratory integration with IDEXX in-house and reference lab for diagnostic workflow, manage veterinary billing and payment collection for practice revenue management, handle prescription management and controlled drug logging for veterinary pharmacy compliance, access inventory and drug management for veterinary practice supply chain, retrieve reminder and wellness plan management for preventive care engagement, manage multi-location veterinary hospital operations for corporate veterinary group management, and integrate Cornerstone with IDEXX laboratory, imaging, and diagnostic platforms.
use_cases: Managing veterinary appointments from clinic operations agents
Integrating IDEXX lab results from diagnostic workflow agents
Processing veterinary billing from practice revenue agents
Tracking controlled drug dispensing from pharmacy compliance agents
not_for: Human healthcare without veterinary practice context
Large academic veterinary teaching hospitals with custom PIMS
Practices using ezyVet or AVImark exclusively
best_when: A companion animal practice, specialty hospital, or corporate veterinary group using IDEXX Cornerstone wants AI agents to automate appointment management, lab integration, billing, and controlled substance tracking.
avoid_when: CONTROLLED SUBSTANCE DEA COMPLIANCE: Veterinary controlled drug logging via Cornerstone must comply with DEA 21 CFR regulations for Schedule II-V drug dispensing and inventory; automated controlled substance record errors create DEA audit risk and license suspension. VCPR (Veterinary-Client-Patient Relationship) — automated prescription dispensing requires valid VCPR; automated prescription without veterinarian examination violates state veterinary practice acts. IDEXX platform lock-in — Cornerstone is deeply integrated with IDEXX in-house diagnostics; API access to lab data may be restricted to IDEXX-ecosystem partners.

auth.notes: IDEXX Cornerstone uses API key authentication. REST API for partner integrations. Limited public developer documentation. Westbrook, Maine HQ (IDEXX Laboratories). IDEXX Laboratories (IDXX NASDAQ). Cornerstone founded 1987. IDEXX acquired Cornerstone 1994. 27,000+ veterinary practices. Market-leading PIMS in North America. Deep IDEXX diagnostic integration. Competes with ezyVet (IDEXX also owns), AVImark, and Covetrus for veterinary practice management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual per-practice subscription
pricing.notes: Westbrook, ME. IDEXX Laboratories (IDXX NASDAQ). Founded 1987. 27,000+ vet practices. North American PIMS market leader. IDEXX also owns ezyVet. Competes with Covetrus for veterinary software.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented per partner integration

known_agent_gotchas: DEA CONTROLLED SUBSTANCE COMPLIANCE: Veterinary Schedule II-V controlled drug dispensing must comply with DEA 21 CFR regulations; automated controlled substance logging errors create DEA audit findings and potential veterinary license risk

VCPR prescription requirement — automated prescription dispensing requires valid Veterinary-Client-Patient Relationship; automated prescription without recent veterinarian examination violates state veterinary practice acts and creates liability

IDEXX diagnostic ecosystem lock-in — Cornerstone integrates deeply with IDEXX in-house diagnostic equipment; API access to lab results may be restricted to IDEXX-approved partners; third-party lab integration may have limited API support

State veterinary practice act variation — veterinary prescription and dispensing rules vary by state; automated dispensing must apply state-specific rules for prescription requirements and controlled substance procedures
On-premises deployment — Cornerstone is primarily on-premises; cloud integration requires network access to clinic server; hardware and network reliability affects API availability
No webhooks — appointment, lab result, and billing event notification requires polling; no native event push architecture
agent_readiness.security_notes: Veterinary practice management. SOC2. API key auth. US/CA. Veterinary patient and medical data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Veterinary PIMS. SOC2. API key. US/CA. Veterinary patient and controlled substance data.
